states.name: planned
states.description: Logical Operation exists but is not yet eligible to dispatch.
entry_requirements: Operation intent, target, retry and idempotency classes are recorded.

states.name: ready
states.description: Preconditions and authority permit a new Attempt to be created.
entry_requirements: Required permissions and preconditions are current.

states.name: dispatching
states.description: A new Attempt has been created and is being routed or delivered to a producer.
entry_requirements: Attempt identity, nonce and execution generations are fixed.

states.name: executing
states.description: Current Attempt is accepted/executing under the selected producer.

states.name: waiting
states.description: Operation is waiting for retry delay, external result, human action, capacity or another registered condition.

states.name: uncertain
states.description: The physical effect may have occurred but proof is insufficient for success, failure or safe retry.
entry_requirements: Uncertainty reason and reconciliation requirement are recorded.

states.name: succeeded
states.description: The Operation's required bounded proof claims and result conditions are satisfied.

states.name: failed
states.description: Operation is terminally unsuccessful under retry and Activity policy.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Operation cancellation reached its required cleanup boundary.

states.name: blocked
states.description: Operation cannot proceed without changed authorization, capability, compatibility or manual decision.
entry_requirements: Blocking reason and required action are retained.

required_preconditions: Parent Activity exists and Operation contract validates.
Preconditions, retry and idempotency policy permit an Attempt.
New Attempt, nonce and current execution generations exist.
Attempt acceptance is current and correlated.
Structured wait reason and wake condition exist.
Effect cannot be safely classified from current evidence.
Required proof definitions are satisfied by valid current Receipts/read-back.
Retry policy is exhausted or declares terminal failure.
Cancellation result and required cleanup evidence exist.
Typed blocking condition and required action are recorded.
